mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Excessively high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 255) triggers central bank rate hikes, compressing equity earnings multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL > 255.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for the INDPRO-GDPC1 interaction in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts (HOUST < 1150) indicates weakening demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as economic growth prospects deteriorate.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite HOUST < 1150.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150,000) reflects a tightening labor market, increasing consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite PAYEMS > 150,000.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE < 3.5%) signals labor market overheating, prompting inflationary pressures and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite UNRATE < 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS > 2.5%) and declining labor force participation (RSAFS < 525,000) signal a tightening cycle with weak growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises above 2.5% and RSAFS falls below 525,000
regime_hint: tightening monetary cycle with weak labor demand
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS-RSAFS interaction drops below 0.03 in any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent demand-side strength (GDPC1 growth > 2% and HOUST > 1200) drives corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 and HOUST both above thresholds
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1-HOUST interaction drops below 0.05 in any 3-year window.
